extortion.description: Datenlotsen Informationssysteme GmbH offers universities, colleges and other educational organizations state-of-the-art digital solutions designed specifically to support learning, teaching and research. CampusNet is an integrated, process-driven platform that supports all of the administrative tasks in a higher education organization. Already in use at numerous colleges and universities around Germany, CampusNet has emerged as the market-leading standard when it comes to efficiently managing higher education. Employees: 200 Revenue: $17.2 Million Industry: Business Services  Phone Number: +49 402709680
